assessmentQuestionVersion.name: Post Acute Care Role & Core Expectations Acknowledgment
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText: Core Expectations: Functions within the acute care hospital and/or sub-acute/post-acute setting, working in collaboration with, and being an integral member of the Post Acute Services team. Primary role involves the care of acute and complex chronically ill patients 16 years of age and older by managing the day to day patient care from admission to discharge.

AssessmentQuestion.name: Post Acute Care Role & Core Expectations Acknowledgment
